name: Eggplant Caviar Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggplant in half lengthwise.
2. Bake on a greased cookie sheet cut side down at 400°F for 60 minutes.
3. Allow the eggplant to cool completely.
4. Gently squeeze out excess water using a spoon.
5. Scoop the pulp into a bowl and mash with a fork.
6. Crush the garlic using a garlic press.
7. Add all remaining ingredients to the mashed eggplant and blend well.
8. Cover and chill in the refrigerator.
9. This recipe makes about 3 1/2 cups of dip.
10. Suggested dippers: Sesame Crackers, Lavash Crackers, Cocktail Rye Bread, Scallions, Bell Peppers
